query: SELECT code, title, price, displayOrder, COUNT(l.id) as lessons FROM courses c LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId WHERE courseType = 'ged' GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.title, c.price, c.displayOrder ORDER BY displayOrder;
